title: React Native Developer (Mid–Senior)
description: About Us Ruby Labs is a leading tech company that creates and operates innovative consumer products. We offer a diverse range of opportunities across the health, education, and entertainment industries. Our innovative teams are driving the future of consumer-led products, and we're always looking for passionate individuals to join us. Learn more about our story at: https://rubylabs.com/about-us/ About The Role At RubyLabs, we’re looking for a React Native Developer (Mid–Senior) to join our growing engineering team as we expand into mobile. This is a high-impact role for an engineer who enjoys shipping real product features, solving performance challenges, and building clean, scalable applications for iOS and Android. You’ll collaborate closely with backend, product, and design teams while owning meaningful parts of the mobile codebase and helping deliver a fast, reliable, and polished experience to our users. Key Responsibilities Deliver new mobile product features with strong execution and attention to detail. Maintain and improve the React Native codebase, performance, and stability. Integrate with backend APIs, caching layers, and real-time services. Debug production issues, investigate edge cases, and ship fixes quickly. Implement crash reporting and performance observability (Sentry, tracing, logs, metrics). Optimize app performance across rendering, navigation, memory usage, latency, and offline behavior. Write clean, maintainable code with a strong understanding of software fundamentals. Contribute to technical discussions, planning, documentation, and delivery decisions. Support improvements to builds, releases, testing, and app store deployments. Qualifications 3–5+ years of experience building mobile applications. Strong production experience with React Native. Deep understanding of React fundamentals (hooks, context, component lifecycle, rendering behavior). Experience working with native modules and iOS/Android bridging when needed. Experience shipping and maintaining apps on the App Store and Google Play. Experience with mobile builds, releases, CI/CD, or OTA update flows (EAS, CodePush, or similar). Experience with crash reporting and observability tools (e.g., Sentry, performance tracing, logs). Strong grasp of software development fundamentals and best practices. Ability to debug and fix issues confidently in production. Comfortable owning features or technical components with autonomy. Demonstrates accountability for edge cases, reliability, and user experience. Passionate about building scalable, reliable products that users depend on. Nice to have Experience working in startup or high-ownership product teams. Experience improving performance, automating releases, or enhancing mobile reliability at scale. Familiarity with backend services (Node.js, AWS, Redis, Cloudflare) to enable seamless API integration. Experience contributing to or building mobile design systems or shared component libraries. Experience with real-time mobile data flows (WebSockets, streaming, event ingestion). Location Ruby Labs operates within the CET (Central European Time) zone. Applicants from any country are welcome to apply for the position as long as they are located within approximately ± 4 hours of CET. This ensures optimal collaboration and communication during working hours. Benefits Discover the perks of being part of our vibrant team! We offer: Remote Work Environment: Embrace the freedom to work from anywhere, anytime, promoting a healthy work-life balance. Unlimited PTO: Enjoy unlimited paid time off to recharge and prioritize your well-being, without counting days. Paid National Holidays: Celebrate and relax on national holidays with paid time off to unwind and recharge. Company-provided MacBook: Experience seamless productivity with top-notch Apple MacBooks provided to all employees who need them. Flexible Independent Contractor Agreement: Unlock the benefits of flexibility, autonomy, and entrepreneurial opportunities. Benefit from tax advantages, networking opportunities, reduced employment obligations, and the freedom to work from anywhere. Read more about it here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tzxGX4Uu7Ts_HCLFXESKLnKaaBfVCPf1f9AYZPrkjJM/preview?tab=t.0 Be part of our fast-growing team and seize this excellent opportunity for personal and professional growth! Interview Process After submitting your application, we conduct a thorough review which typically takes 3 to 5 days, but may occasionally take longer due to the volume of applications received. If we see a potential fit, we proceed with the following steps: Recruiter Screening (40 minutes) First Interview (30 minutes) Technical Interview (45 minutes) Final Interview (30 minutes) Life at Ruby Labs At Ruby Labs, we move fast, aim high, and expect the same from our team. We’re not here to play small—we’re here to build, grow, and win. That means we look for people who are ambitious, driven, and ready to give their best every single day. This is a place for individuals who thrive under pressure, embrace challenges, and see opportunity in every obstacle. If you’re hungry to achieve, motivated by impact, and want to grow at the speed of your own ambition, Ruby Labs offers the platform to make it happen. Here, effort is matched with reward. We recognize those who go all in and deliver results, and we create space for people who want more—more responsibility, more growth, and more success.

title: BACKEND DEVELOPER (BiP)
description: Turkcell olarak yeteneklerimize eşsiz insan deneyimi yaşatarak, değer yaratan sürdürülebilir bir organizasyon inşa etmeyi ve işveren markamızı zirveye taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Bu hedef doğrultusunda benimsediğimiz değerlerimizi iş yapış biçimlerimize yansıtıyoruz. Turkcell’de Neye Değer Veriyoruz? İnsan Odaklılık: Eşsiz insan deneyimi oluşturmak amacıyla uygulamalarımızın merkezinde insanı konumluyor, çalışanlarımızın potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı ve onların yeteneklerini geliştirmeyi hedefliyoruz. Yenilik: İnsanların hayatında fark yaratan yenilikçi çözümler üretmek, fikir ve teknolojileri keşfetmek için tutkulu bir şekilde çalışıyoruz. 🚀 Mükemmellik: Dahil olduğumuz ve temas ettiğimiz her noktada mükemmeliyeti hedefliyor, kendimize yüksek standartlar belirliyor, olağanüstü sonuçlar elde ediyoruz. 🎯👌🏼 İş Birliği: Başarının anahtarı olarak birlikte çalışmayı, saygı ve şeffaflık kültürünü teşvik ediyoruz. 👥🔗🧩 Müşteri Odaklılık: Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını merkeze koyarak olağanüstü müşteri deneyimleri sunmayı hedefliyoruz. 🤝🖇️ Sürdürülebilirlik: Müşterilerimiz, çalışanlarımız ve dünyamız için sürdürülebilir bir gelecek amacıyla çalışıyoruz. 🌍 Ne Bekliyoruz? Üniversitelerin ilgili 4 yıllık bölümlerinden mezun, En ez 5 yıl Java ve Spring Boot Framework deneyimi olan, REST /SOAP/gRPC/Stateless API ve microservice mimarilerinde tecrübeli, Caching metodolojilerine hakim (Redis+), Search domain teknolojileri (ElasticSearch, RedisSearch plus) hakkında bilgi sahibi, Event-driven mimari konusunda deneyimli (Kafka+), XMPP , EE2E (Uçtan uca şifreleme gibi )mesajlaşma protokollarinde deneyiml, Container mimariler üzerinde çalışma deneyimli (Docker, Kubernetes, Openshift), Unit test süreçlerine hakim, CI/CD araçlarında tecrübeli, Çevik çalışma yöntemlerini (Scrum/Kanban) benimsemiş, Yatay organizasyon yapısında, çevik bir ekip kültürüne uyum sağlayabilen, Planlı olan, sürekli öğrenen ve öğrendiklerini paylaşan, Yüksek trafik alan uygulamalarda deneyim kazanmayı isteyen, Bireysel motivasyonu yüksek, öğrenmeye ve gelişime açık, takım çalışmasına yatkın, Güçlü analitik düşünme, problem çözme ve inisiyatif alma becerisine sahip, İnovatif bakış açısıyla yaratıcı çözümler üretebilen, Sözlü ve yazılı iletişim becerileri güçlü. Turkcell'de BACKEND DEVELOPER (BiP) Ne Yapar? Turkcell BIP Mesajlaşma Platformları üzerinden yürütülen geliştirmelerin teknik tasarım ve yazılım süreçlerinden sorumludur, Mimari kararlara yön verecek teknolojik trendleri takip eder performans gereksinimlerini belirler, Ürün geliştirme sürecinin uçtan uca kalitesine katkı sağlar ve test süreçlerini destekler, Servislerin geliştirilmesi, hatalarının giderilmesi, KPI takibi ve operasyonel devir süreçlerinden sorumludur, Geliştirilen uygulamaların devreye alınma süreçlerini koordine eder ve gerektiğinde teknik destek verir, Ürün ve çözümlerin yazılım mimarisini, teknik ve fonksiyonel yol haritasını belirler, tüm yazılım ve geliştirme yaşam döngüsünden (SDLC - yaratılması, yaşatılması ve gerektiğinde dönüştürülmesi ya da sonlandırılması) sorumludur, Müşteri iş ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda, ürün ve çözümleri geliştirir. İş birimlerinden gelen taleplerin tasarım-geliştirme safhalarının müşteri odaklı ve rekabete uygun hızda ardı ardına geliştirilmesini sağlar, Sorumlusu olduğu altyapılar ile ilgili süreçlere ilişkin ihtiyaçların analiz incelemesini (review’unu) gerçekleştirir, teknik tasarımları oluşturur, proje planlarını detaylandırır, geliştirme (development) fazını yürütür ve test destek aşamalarında görev alır. Devreye alım sonrası destek ve kod değişikliği gerektiren konularda ilgili yazılımların gerçekleştirilmesinden sorumludur, Sorumlu olduğu sistemler ve geliştirmeler için gerekli olan yatırım bütçesini planlar ve yürütür, Uygulanabilir teknoloji, ürün ve çözümlerin oluşturulmasına yönelik öncelikle Turkcell Grup ihtiyacının yaratılması ve ticari çözümlerin geliştirilmesi ve uygulanmasından sorumludur, AR-GE vizyonu kapsamında ürünleştirme fırsatlarını bütünsel bir bakış açısı ile gözetir ve gerekli yatırımlara karar verir, Sorumluluk alanındaki vizyon, hedef ve stratejileri belirler, Uygulama yol haritalarının ve uygulama planının gerektirdiği kararlarının alınmasını sağlar ve takibini yapar. Yan Haklar ve Faydalar Ekibimizin bir üyesi olarak, rekabetçi bir ücret, esnek çalışma düzenlemeleri, kariyer gelişimi ve ilerleme fırsatları gibi bir dizi yan hak ve fayda ile buluşma fırsatı yakalayacaksın. Detaylara " https://bit.ly/TurkcellTKusagi ’’ üzerinden ulaşabilirsin. 🎁▶️ Turkcell bir eşit fırsat işverenidir ve ırka, renge, dine, cinsiyete, ulusal kökene, etnik kökene, yaşa, fiziksel görünüşe veya duruma, medeni durumuna, askerlik durumuna bakılmaksızın, tüm nitelikli başvuru sahiplerini istihdam için değerlendirmeye alır.

title: Laravel Geliştirici
description: Mersin Ofisimizde Laravel Yazılım Geliştirici Arıyoruz! Sadece Mersin’in değil bölgemizin ileri gelen teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olan Eterna Teknoloji ve grup şirketlerinde yenilikçi projelere imza atarken, ekibimizin büyümesine liderlik edecek bir Laravel Yazılım Geliştirici arıyoruz. Şirket Hakkında: Mersin merkezli Ar-Ge odaklı bir yazılım firmasıyız; web, mobil, siber güvenlik, yapay zeka ve elektronik çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Genç ve yenilikçi ekibimizle endüstri-standardı teknoloji ve metodolojileri kullanıyoruz. Şirket kültürümüz öğrenmeyi, dayanışmayı ve mühendislik mükemmelliğini teşvik eder. Aranan Nitelikler: En az Bilgisayar veya Yazılım Mühendisliği lisans mezunu, Mersin'de ikâmet ediyor olmak, İyi derecede İngilizce, En az 1 yıl Laravel Framework'ü ile web uygulamaları geliştirmek, PHP’de iyi seviye bilgiye sahip, Diğer Modern PHP frameworkleri (Symfony vb.) ve RESTful / GraphQL API mimarileri konusunda deneyim, Versiyon kontrol sistemlerinde (Git) uzmanlık ve kod standartlaştırma araçlarının (Lint, Prettier vb.) aktif kullanımı, MVC mimarisi ile ilgili derinlemesine bilgi sahibi. Tercih Edilen Nitelikler (Nice-to-Have): Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde performans tuning ve veritabanı (MySQL/PostgreSQL) optimizasyonu deneyimi, Ön yüz teknolojilerine (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, React veya Vue.js) aşinalık, Mikroservis mimarileri ve olay tabanlı sistemler hakkında bilgi, Mentorluk ve eğitim süreçlerine katkı sağlama tutkusu. Görev ve Sorumluluklar: Adaydan beklentimiz, yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde sorunsuz bir şekilde rol üstlenmesi: Laravel ile yazılmış mevcut projeleri sürdürülebilir hale getirmek, geliştirmek; gerektiğinde Laravel benzeri modern framework’ler ile refaktör yapmak ve kod kalitesini artırmak. En az bir ek dilde (Python, Node.js, Java, Go veya C# gibi) üretim tecrübesi; farklı dillerde yazılmış mikrosistemleri entegre etmek ve API mimarileri tasarlamak. Git tabanlı versiyon kontrol, kod gözden geçirme ve CI/CD süreçlerinin (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions) kurulması ve işletilmesi. Takım içinde DevOps kültürünü benimsetmek; Docker/Kubernetes ve bulut ortamlarındaki dağıtımları yönetmek. Takım üyelerini mentörlük ile desteklemek, teknik bilgi aktarmak ve kod standartları için Lint benzeri araçların kullanımını teşvik etmek. Performans ve veritabanı optimizasyonu çalışmalarına liderlik etmek. Neden Biz? Yenilikçi ve özgün projelerle çalışma fırsatı. Sürekli öğrenmeyi teşvik eden eğitim programları. Rekabetçi maaş ve yan haklar. Dinamik ve işbirliğine dayalı bir çalışma ortamı. Eterna Teknoloji ile Geleceğe Birlikte Yön Verin! Eğer siz de yenilikçi projelerde yer almak, kendinizi sürekli geliştirmek ve dinamik bir ekipte çalışmak istiyorsanız, Eterna Teknoloji ve grup şirketlerinde sizin için bir yer var. Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz!

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: İş Tanımı Eğitim sektöründe faaliyet gösteren şirketimiz için Django ve DRF kullanarak arka uç uygulamalarımızın geliştirilmesine katkıda bulunacak, öğrenmeye hevesli bir Junior Backend Developer arıyoruz. Gerçek hayattaki projelerde çalışarak becerilerinizi geliştirebileceğiniz, dinamik ve destekleyici bir ekip ortamı sunuyoruz. Sorumluluklar ·       Django / DRF ile REST API geliştirme süreçlerine aktif destek olmak ·       Teknik dokümantasyonları okuyup analiz edebilmek ·       Mevcut projelerde “bug fix” ve yeni özellik geliştirme görevleri almak ·       Temel veritabanı işlemleri yürütmek ve ORM kullanmak ·       Kod “review” süreçlerine katılarak geri bildirim almak ve vermek ·       Agile (Scrum) metodolojisine ve süreçlerine uyum sağlamak Aranan Nitelikler (Zorunlu) ·       İyi derecede Python bilgisine ve sağlam OOP temellerine sahip olmak ·       Django kullanarak uçtan uca en az 1 proje tamamlamış olmak (GitHub/GitLab üzerinden referans gösterebilmek) ·       REST API mimarisi ve mantığına tam olarak hakim olmak ·       İlişkisel veritabanı mantığına hakim olmak ve temel SQL sorgularını (CRUD işlemleri, temel JOIN'ler vb.) yazabilmek. ·       Teknik dokümanları ve hata mesajlarını rahatça okuyup anlayabilecek seviyede İngilizce bilmek ·       Aktif Git kullanımı (Pull request açma, branch yönetimi, conflict çözme deneyimi) ·       API dokümantasyonu hazırlama (Swagger, Postman vb.) ve kullanma tecrübesi ·       Herhangi bir bulut (Cloud) ortama temel seviyede "deployment" yapmış olmak ·       Öğrenmeye açık, proaktif ve sorumluluk bilincine sahip olmak Tercih Sebebi (Artı Nitelikler) ·       Django Rest Framework (DRF) ile aktif proje geliştirmiş olmak ·       PostgreSQL veritabanı yönetim sistemiyle pratik deneyim sahibi olmak ·       Geliştirme ortamında Docker kullanmış olmak ·       Redis ve Celery teknolojilerine aşina olmak veya teorik bilgi sahibi olmak Sana Ne Sunuyoruz ·       Gerçek projelerde aktif rol alma fırsatı ·       Deneyimli ekipten mentorluk ve sürekli teknik gelişim desteği ·       Modern backend teknolojileriyle (Django, Docker, Redis, Celery vb.) çalışma imkanı ·       Tamamen (Full) remote ve esnek çalışma ortamı

title: Full Stack Developer
description: About the Company Roi House Consultancy is a performance marketing partner that specializes in elevating digital presence. With a focus on measurable growth, Roi House delivers tailored solutions in Performance Marketing, Brand Marketing, SEO, Data Intelligence, and Web Analytics. By leveraging advanced analytics tools and development expertise, we help shape and execute digital strategies that drive real impact across international markets. Responsibilities Collaborate with team on all aspects of software design and coding. Develop, test, and maintain high-performance web applications and back-end systems. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code. Monitor and optimize the technical performance of internal systems. Configure and manage servers, APIs, and CDN integrations. Conduct code reviews, performance tests, and debugging. Contribute to architecture decisions and continuous improvement of technical infrastructure. Requirements 5-6 years of experience in Full Stack Web Development. Proficiency in JavaScript and PHP. Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and responsive design principles. Experience in React.js, Node.js, Python, or WordPress is a plus. Understanding of accessibility and security compliance (depending on project). Familiarity with session management in distributed environments. Experience with web server technologies (Apache, Nginx) for content redirection. Strong knowledge of CDN platforms (Cloudflare, Akamai, AWS CloudFront, Fastly). Understanding of IP routing and forwarding protocols (BGP, OSPF, NAT). Experience in user authentication and authorization across multiple systems. Knowledge of databases and SQL. Comfort with UNIX/Linux environments is an advantage. Experience in digital marketing, affiliate industry, or data-driven projects is a strong plus. ✅ Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field preferred. Strong analytical and communication skills. English level: B1 or above. Work mode: Remote. What We Offer Opportunity to work on international, performance-oriented projects. Data-driven and collaborative company culture. Competitive compensation based on experience and skills. Long-term growth opportunities within a tech-focused environment.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Backend Engineer in Turkey. In this role, you will be part of a highly collaborative, distributed engineering team building complex backend systems and APIs that power global operations. You will work on scalable, high-performance software that directly impacts users and businesses worldwide. Operating in a remote-first, asynchronous environment, you’ll have the autonomy to organize your work while contributing to cross-functional projects and platform improvements. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining backend solutions with a focus on performance, reliability, and scalability. This role provides opportunities to lead major projects, mentor peers, and influence technical direction. If you thrive in a challenging, fast-paced environment and enjoy solving meaningful technical problems, this position offers strong professional growth and impact. Accountabilities Lead the development of backend systems, APIs, and integrations for key products, ensuring performance, scalability, and maintainability Participate in cross-team initiatives and provide technical insights to improve product design and functionality Contribute to the shared codebase through code reviews, mentoring, and collaborative problem-solving Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve complex technical and business issues, maintaining high-quality standards Engage in non-team activities including support rotations, RFC discussions, hiring processes, and platform improvements Collaborate closely with frontend, QA, and SRE teams to deliver end-to-end solutions Influence technical direction and propose enhancements to architecture, tools, and workflows Requirements Extensive experience as a Senior Backend Engineer with a proven track record of building, deploying, and maintaining complex software projects Proficiency in Postgres or similar relational databases Hands-on experience with CI/CD tools such as GitLab, GitHub, Jenkins, or equivalent Strong software engineering fundamentals, including design patterns, testing, debugging, and code quality best practices Nice-to-have skills: functional programming experience (Elixir, Erlang, Scala, Clojure, Haskell), Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, React/Next.js Ability to work independently in a remote, asynchronous environment and manage multiple priorities effectively Excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and strong communication and collaboration abilities Benefits Fully remote work with the flexibility to organize your schedule asynchronously Competitive salary and stock options Unlimited paid time off and generous parental leave policies Mental health support and wellness resources Learning and development budget to support professional growth Home office equipment and setup allowance Opportunities to participate in local meetups or coworking spaces with reimbursement Supportive and innovative work culture that encourages autonomy and experimentation Why Apply Through Jobgether? We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: We are looking for a mid level Java Backend Developer focusing on financial transactions, payment systems, reconciliation, and regulatory compliance. Core Responsibilities Financial & System Integration: Develop integrations between the Core System and Internal Reconciliation/Payment Systems. Compliance & Reporting: Implement reporting solutions for Financial Authorities and manage the export of reconciliation files. Transaction Management: Handle accounting data, manage transactions, and ensure data integrity. Product Feature Development: Build backend features for financial products, including tracking the source of cash-back and refunds in the Backoffice. Code Quality & Lifecycle: Ensure high code quality and participate actively in all phases of the software development lifecycle. Requirements 3+ years of professional Java backend development experience (Spring Boot, Microservices). Strong knowledge of system architecture, design principles, and RESTful API development. Proficiency with SQL and experience with NoSQL databases. Experience in data integration, SFTP, and file transfer protocols. Prior experience in finance, payment, or reconciliation systems is a strong asset. Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

title: Backend Developer Specialist
description: Qualifications & Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related technical field Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience in backend software development Strong expertise in .NET Core, C#, Web API, and Entity Framework Core Solid understanding and practical experience with Clean Architecture and Domain Driven Design (DDD) principles Proven experience in designing scalable, high-performance, and maintainable backend systems Strong proficiency in MS SQL (required); experience with PostgreSQL and/or MongoDB is a plus Hands-on experience with Elasticsearch, including indexing, search optimization, and performance tuning Experience working with Redis and other distributed systems concepts (caching strategies, pub/sub, data consistency) Good knowledge of microservices architecture and RESTful API design Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure and/or AWS is an advantage Proficient in Git-based version control systems (Git, GitHub, GitLab) Basic knowledge of React or Angular is a plus Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and architectural decision-making skills Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively within a team Proactive, ownership-driven, and results-oriented mindset Fluent in English, capable of working with global and cross-functional teams Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable and high-performance backend and/or frontend applications aligned with business objectives, Take ownership of end-to-end software development lifecycle — including analysis, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance, Collaborate closely with business analysts, architects, project managers, and other development teams to deliver effective and innovative solutions, Participate in architectural design and decision-making processes to ensure system scalability, performance, and maintainability, Conduct code reviews to uphold coding standards, best practices, and maintain code quality across projects, Proactively identify and resolve performance bottlenecks, technical risks, and system inefficiencies, Mentor junior developers and support their technical growth through guidance and code reviews, Engage in DevOps, CI/CD, and automation practices to enhance deployment efficiency and reliability, Stay current with emerging technologies, frameworks, and design patterns, continuously bringing innovation into the development cycle, Take ownership of assigned tasks and ensure delivery of clean, testable, and high-quality code within defined timelines.

title: Backend Yazılım Geliştirici
description: Backend Yazılım Geliştirici (PHP / Python / AWS) Şirketimizin mevcut sistemlerinin sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak ve yeni nesil bulut tabanlı backend çözümleri geliştirmek üzere deneyimli bir Backend Yazılım Geliştirici (3+ yıl) arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İş Tanımı Mevcut on-premise PHP uygulamalarının bakım, iyileştirme ve hata giderme süreçlerinin yürütülmesi On-premise ortamda çalışan Python (Django) tabanlı mikroservis mimarisine destek verilmesi AWS platformu üzerinde yeni backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve devreye alınması Sistem performansı, güvenliği ve sürekliliğinin sağlanması Gerektiğinde projelerin uçtan uca bağımsız şekilde yürütülmesi Aranan Nitelikler PHP ve Python dillerinde backend geliştirme deneyimi Django framework’ü ve tercihen mikroservis mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi AWS servisleri (EC2, Lambda, RDS, S3 vb.) hakkında deneyim PostgreSQL, MySQL ve DynamoDB veritabanları ile çalışma tecrübesi On-premise sistemler ile çalışma deneyimi Yazılım geliştirme prensipleri, temiz kod ve sürdürülebilirlik konularında yetkinlik Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerileri gelişmiş Bağımsız çalışabilme ve sorumluluk alabilme yetkinliği Tercih Sebepleri Yapay zeka destekli geliştirme araçlarını etkin şekilde kullanabilme CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi Docker ve container teknolojileri ile deneyim Legacy sistemlerin modernizasyonu konusunda tecrübe Genel Nitelikler Adayın, verilen görevleri sahiplenerek sonuç odaklı şekilde ilerleyebilen, teknik olarak yetkin ve sorumluluk bilinci yüksek bir profesyonel olması beklenmektedir.

title: Full Stack Developer — Partner
description: Karbonsa'nın dijital platformunu geliştiren teknoloji ekibine katılacak ve ürünün büyüme sürecinde stratejik rol üstlenecek bir Full Stack Developer — Partner arıyoruz. Görev Tanımı Next.js / React tabanlı web uygulamaları geliştirme Supabase (PostgreSQL) veritabanı tasarımı ve API geliştirme Müşteri ihtiyaçlarına yönelik yeni modül ve özellik geliştirme Ürün yol haritasının belirlenmesine teknik perspektifle katkıda bulunma Teknik mimari kararlarının birlikte alınması ve uygulanması Kod kalitesi, performans ve güvenlik standartlarının sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili alanlardan mezun En az 1 yıl full stack geliştirme deneyimi Next.js, React, TypeScript deneyimi PostgreSQL / Supabase bilgisi Tailwind CSS ile modern UI geliştirme Tercih Sebebi SaaS ürün geliştirme deneyimi Sürdürülebilirlik veya iklim teknolojileri alanına ilgi Ne Sunuyoruz Sürdürülebilirlik sektöründe kurucu ekipte teknik Partner olarak yer alma fırsatı Global ölçekli bir SaaS ürününün geliştirilmesinde doğrudan söz sahibi olma Proje bazlı esnek çalışma düzeni Regülasyonlarla hızla büyüyen bir sektörde erken aşama pozisyon avantajı Başvurular karbonsa.com/kariyer üzerinden alınmaktadır.

title: Full Stack Developer (Flutter)
description: We are seeking a talented Fullstack Developer with a focus on mobile development for our partner, a company revolutionizing pet owner-veterinarian communication. In this pivotal role, you will primarily focus on their B2C application for pet owners, driving the creation and enhancement of features such as seamless appointment booking, comprehensive pet profile management, and an exceptional in-app user experience. This is a hands-on position that demands a deep understanding of system architecture and a commitment to writing clean, maintainable code. What You’ll Do Build and maintain the mobile application for pet owners using Flutter. Develop and enhance backend APIs using Python or other backend technologies. Design and implement scalable application architecture. Integrate third-party services and payment systems. Utilize advanced tools like Cursor and other AI coding assistants to optimize development speed and efficiency. Collaborate closely with designers and the product team to deliver an outstanding UX. Actively participate in planning and technical decision-making, where your insights and opinions are highly valued. Requirements A minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in mobile or full-stack development. Demonstrated strong proficiency in Flutter. Fluent in English communication, both written and verbal. Proven experience in building and integrating with REST APIs. A solid understanding of Git and version control practices. Basic experience with Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipelines. A clear grasp of software architecture principles and clean code methodologies. Comfortable and effective in a small, distributed team environment. Nice to Have Prior experience in e-commerce or payment gateway integrations (e.g. Chargebee, Stripe). Familiarity with cloud deployment platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or similar). Contributions to open-source projects or development of personal applications. An understanding of mobile User Experience (UX) and usability best practices.

title: Senior Backend GoLang Developer (Cybersecurity)
description: Acronis is a world leader in cyber protection, delivering natively integrated solutions that monitor, control, and protect the data that businesses and lives depend on. Driven by our passion to protect every workload, we’ve built the industry’s only all-in-one cyber protection platform. We are looking for a Senior Backend Developer to join our mission of protecting the digital world. You would be responsible for developing services that are scalable and maintainable, can handle huge load and big volume of real-time data. You will ensure that these applications are well documented and has a reasonable test coverage. You will coordinate with the rest of the team working on different layers of the infrastructure. A commitment to collaborative problem solving, sophisticated design, and quality product is essential. What You'll Do Designing and developing scalable, robust, testable, efficient, and easily maintainable code Translating software requirements into stable, working, high performance software Playing a key role in architectural and design decisions, building toward an efficient micro services distributed architecture Creating design documents What You Bring 5+ years of experience in software development with Go programming language Ability to design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) Experience with Artifactory, Kubernetes, and Ansible orchestration engine Experience with monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and Kibana Good skills in writing unit tests, integration tests, and debugging Go applications Knowledge of database architecture and design Ability to interpret written requirements, technical specification documents and to create design documents Good English communication skills, including verbal and written abilities Would Be a Plus Experience with noSQL databases (e.g.,Redis, ClickHouse) Experience with Scrum/Kanban, Git, JIRA Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Jenkins) Hands-on experience using AI agents and assistants for software design, code generation, and refactoring Experience with spec-driven or contract-first development Ability to review AI-generated output for correctness, security, performance, and maintainability Hands-on experience with Rust Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities Please submit your resume and application in English Who We Are A Swiss company founded in Singapore in 2003, Acronis offers over twenty years of innovation with 15 offices worldwide and more than 1800 employees in 50+ countries. Acronis Cyber Protect is available in 26 languages in 150 countries and is used by over 20,000 service providers to protect over 750,000 businesses. Our corporate culture is focused on making a positive impact on the lives of each employee and the communities we serve. Mutual trust, respect and belief that we can contribute to the world everyday are the cornerstones of our team. Each member of our “A-Team” plays an instrumental role in driving the success of our innovative and expanding business. We seek individuals who excel in dynamic, global environments and have a never give up attitude, contributing to our collective growth and impact. OUR INTERVIEW PRACTICES To ensure a fair and genuine hiring process, candidates are expected to participate in interviews without the use of AI tools, automated prompts, or third-party assistance. Interviews are designed to assess individual skills, experience, and communication style and we value authentic, real-time interaction. Use of AI or external assistance during live interviews may result in disqualification. For roles where AI skills are being evaluated, permitted use of AI tools will be clearly communicated in advance. Candidates may be asked to disable virtual backgrounds or participate in in-person interviews. All employment offers are contingent upon successful completion of applicable criminal, education and identity background checks Acronis is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, marital status, national origin, physical or mental disability, medical condition, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.

title: Senior Frontend Developer (Vue)
description: Acronis is a world leader in cyber protection, delivering natively integrated solutions that monitor, control, and protect the data that businesses and lives depend on. Driven by our passion to protect every workload, we’ve built the industry’s only all-in-one cyber protection platform. We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to join our mission of protecting the digital world. Impact: Your work will directly enhance the security and usability of web-based cyber protection solutions for millions of users worldwide. Innovation: Collaborate with a forward-thinking team to design and optimize modern, scalable front-end applications. Develop secure and high-performance user interfaces that adhere to the highest industry security standards. What You'll Do Develop and maintain scalable, high-performance UI applications for Acronis RMM using TypeScript (Vue). Conduct code reviews and implement best practices to ensure code quality, maintainability, and security. Optimize application performance, responsiveness, and user experience. Troubleshoot and resolve UI-related issues, ensuring smooth functionality across different environments. What You Bring 5+ years of experience in front-end development. Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript, with strong skills in development tools and debugging. Deep expertise in Vue.js, including component-based architecture and state management. Solid understanding of TypeScript, ECMAScript standards, HTML/CSS, and Scss/Sass. Strong knowledge of functional programming, object-oriented programming, and design patterns (Factory, Strategy, MVC, MVVM, Singleton, etc.). Ability to take ownership of feature development and project responsibilities. Experience with Angular, React, Jest, ElectronJS, or Node.js is a plus. A proactive mindset with a willingness to learn and grow in a collaborative team environment. Please submit your resume and application in English Who We Are Acronis is a global cyber protection company that provides natively integrated cybersecurity, data protection, and endpoint management for managed service providers (MSPs), small and medium businesses (SMBs), enterprise IT departments, and home users. Our all-in-one solutions are highly efficient and designed to identify, prevent, detect, respond, remediate, and recover from modern cyber threats with minimal downtime, ensuring data integrity and business continuity. We offer the most comprehensive security solution on the market for MSPs with our unique ability to meet the needs of diverse and distributed IT environments. A Swiss company founded in Singapore in 2003, Acronis offers over twenty years of innovation with 15 offices worldwide and more than 1800 employees in 50+ countries. Acronis Cyber Protect is available in 26 languages in 150 countries and is used by over 20,000 service providers to protect over 750,000 businesses. Our corporate culture is focused on making a positive impact on the lives of each employee and the communities we serve. Mutual trust, respect, and the belief that we can contribute to the world every day are the cornerstones of our team. Each member of our “A-Team” plays an instrumental role in driving the success of our innovative and expanding business. We seek individuals who excel in dynamic, global environments and have a never give up attitude, contributing to our collective growth and impact. OUR INTERVIEW PRACTICES To ensure a fair and genuine hiring process, candidates are expected to participate in interviews without the use of AI tools, automated prompts, or third-party assistance. Interviews are designed to assess individual skills, experience, and communication style and we value authentic, real-time interaction. Use of AI or external assistance during live interviews may result in disqualification. For roles where AI skills are being evaluated, permitted use of AI tools will be clearly communicated in advance. Candidates may be asked to disable virtual backgrounds or participate in in-person interviews. All employment offers are contingent upon successful completion of applicable criminal, education and identity background checks Acronis is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, marital status, national origin, physical or mental disability, medical condition, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.

title: Engineering Manager, SAP CAP Node.js
description: We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager with a strong background in SAP CAP and Node.js to lead our engineering team. This role involves overseeing technical projects, fostering collaboration, and driving innovation while maintaining industry best practices. Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and ensure features adhere to clean code and design principles Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues, and resolve bugs to maintain system integrity Write comprehensive technical and user documentation Collaborate with the team to track performance and address needs effectively Engage with customers and stakeholders to address technical topics and provide metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement, and execution of development processes Provide architectural and design decisions to guide technical implementations Requirements 7+ years of experience in SAPUI5, BTP, HANA, CAP, Node.js, CI/CD (Jenkins, Piper, Webdriver.io), with a broad technological perspective Proven experience leading teams of 10+ people with a focus on cloud technologies, SAP, architecture, and organizational mentoring Proficiency in design principles and microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database, and SAP CAP (Java and Node.js) English proficiency at B2 level or higher We offer International projects with top brands Work with global teams of highly skilled, diverse peers Healthcare benefits Employee financial programs Paid time off and sick leave Upskilling, reskilling and certification courses Unlimited access to the LinkedIn Learning library and 22,000+ courses Global career opportunities Volunteer and community involvement opportunities EPAM Employee Groups Award-winning culture recognized by Glassdoor, Newsweek and LinkedIn

title: Next.js - Nest.js full stack yazılımcı
description: Lütfen aşağıdaki şartlara uygun adaylar başvursunlar. Hemen başlayacak 5+ Yıl Deneyimli Senior Next.js Developer Arıyoruz! Önemli: Lütfen yalnızca belirtilen tüm gereksinimleri karşılayan adaylar başvuru yapsın. 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur. Tam zamanlı çalışacak arkadaşlar ve freelance çalışacak uzmanlarda alınacaktır. Pozisyon: Senior Full Stack Developer (Öncelik: Next.js-Nest.js) Ekibimize, büyük ölçekli ve uzun vadeli projelerde aktif rol alacak, özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü ve deneyimli bir takım arkadaşı arıyoruz. Yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve modern teknolojilerle geliştirilmiş projelerde çalışmaktan keyif alıyorsanız, aradığımız kişi siz olabilirsiniz. Zorunlu Nitelikler Minimum 5 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Next.js konusunda ileri seviye ve gerçek proje deneyimi Nest.js hakkında güçlü bilgi PostgreSQL ile aktif çalışma deneyimi TanStack React Query ile uygulamalı proje tecrübesi Büyük ve karmaşık projelerde görev almış olmak Temiz kod prensiplerine hakimiyet Güçlü analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yeteneği Tercih Sebepleri DevOps bilgisi (CI/CD süreçleri, deployment, sunucu yönetimi vb.) GraphQL deneyimi Çalışma Koşulları Çalışma Şekli: Uzaktan (Zoom üzerinden) Çalışma Günleri: Haftada 6 gün Çalışma Saatleri: 09:00 – 18:00 Öğle Arası: 1 saat Sunduğumuz İmkanlar Büyük ölçekli ve gerçek dünya projelerinde aktif rol Uzun vadeli iş birliği Profesyonel ve gelişim odaklı çalışma ortamı Stabil ve düzenli iş yükü Maaş başlangıç: 75.000TL Eğer tüm gereksinimleri karşılıyorsanız ve özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü bir Senior Developer iseniz, başvurunuzu bekliyoruz. Tekrar hatırlatma: 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur.

title: Senior Java Developer (Full Stack) / Hybrid
description: Job Description We are looking for a Senior Fullstack Java Developer to join our team for a long-term project with a leading client in the industry. This is a hybrid role based in Istanbul, offering an exciting opportunity to work on scalable, high-performance systems with modern technologies. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain robust backend systems using Java 11+ and Spring Framework. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality frontend features using React, Angular, or JSF. Work on microservice-based architecture, ensuring scalability and performance. Integrate and optimize PostgreSQL databases, caching solutions, and message broker technologies. Take part in code reviews, unit testing, and performance tuning. Contribute to architectural decisions and continuous improvement initiatives. Key Qualifications: 7+ years of hands-on experience in Java backend development (Java 11 or higher). Strong knowledge of Spring Framework, PostgreSQL, Microservice Architecture, and Message Broker Technologies (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ). Experience with frontend technologies such as React, Angular, or JSF. Familiarity with caching technologies (e.g., Redis, Ehcache). Understanding of CI/CD, containerization, and cloud-based environments is a plus. Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative environment. Fluent in English (written and verbal). Apply now if you're passionate about building reliable and scalable data solutions in a high-performance environment and Join us in a hybrid role from our Istanbul office, combining remote flexibility with on-site collaboration. Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We review applications from all qualified individuals regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special consideration will be given to candidates with disabilities.
